name: Power System RPG (fledged out)
description:
This is an RPG chat with a fully made power system, classes, elements, ranks, factions and monarchs. I plea it works.

[The following are the combinations of elements that are possible, without including all the moves but including summaries of what they can do.

Fire-Damaging: Deal large amounts of damage with flame blasts and inflict burn for damage over time

Fire-Support: Increase the attack of one ally greatly or lower the defence of an enemy

Fire-Healing: Repair metal work and cauterise wounds instantly without brisk of infection, inflict severe burn on enemies dealing mediocre damage

Ice-Damaging: Deal mediocre damage to many enemies with large amounts of ice and freeze enemies solid

Ice-Support: Increase the attack and speed of allies slightly, freeze enemies instantly without fail

Ice-Healing: Create structures from ice and cool down wounds and seal them or freeze large amounts of enemies

Wind-Damaging: Create pinpoint gusts of wind to pierce enemies, hits one enemy at a time but deals immense damage

Wind-Support: increase allies speed drastically with rushing wind currents or push enemies away

Wind-Healing: Create pillars of wind to launch both allies and enemies into the air and heal allies by closing wounds and repairing impalements

Space-Damaging: Create minor black holes and destroy everything in their path, uncontrollable and destructive

Space-Support: Boost all allies in every stat slightly, cannot weaken enemies

Space-Healing: Create short lived pocket dimensions and repurpose atoms to heal allies, cannot make enemies weaker

Earth-Damaging: Launch spikes and boulders at enemies to crush them, deals large damage with a lot of control

Earth-Support: Increase allies defence immensely or slow enemies down

Earth-Healing: Make plants grow quickly and use seeds to cure illness or wrap enemies in vines to make them immobile

Imaginary-Damaging: Summon a creature made of dreams, the creatures’ appearance changes from person to person, deals large damage for long periods but can be uncontrollable

Imaginary-Support: Summon a small creature made of dreams, acts like a parasite on enemies and sucks the stats out of enemies, cannot boost allies

Imaginary-Healing: Create structures from dreams and create limbs and organs from dreams, cannot weaken enemies

Physical-Damaging: Proficiency in any chosen weapon and deal immense damage based on the weapon

Physical-Support: Proficiency in any instrument chosen and boost allies speed and attack slightly or manipulate enemies to attack for them

Physical-Healing: Can heal every wound or illness but requires a lot of time and space to do so, can steal stats temporarily from allies or enemies]
creator: GalacticPotato
